title: Exporting Completed Forms to PDF
excerpt:
Hi, 
A user asked me if it was possible to export completed forms vs exporting boards into Excel. The goal is that the forms contain the original information input by the user and exported by the recipient. 
Thank you!

posts.author: vparra (Valerie Parra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

A user asked me if it was possible to export completed forms vs exporting boards into Excel. The goal is that the forms contain the original information input by the user and exported by the recipient.

Thank you!

posts.author: Bianca (Bianca Clement)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @vparra have you checked out the Form Response Viewer view?

posts.author: Chrism99 (Chris Medina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @vparra,

@Bianca is right! If you try to add a view, click more views, and then search Form Response Viewer, this app will allow you to view the answers you received in a form view both internally, and share it as a pdf!

2021-09-012551×1781 324 KB

2021-09-01 (1)3198×1754 217 KB

Hope we helped! Let me know if there’s any other questions you have!

Best regards,

Chris Medina
